text:
Created attachment 174265
mcelog.diff

This is a patch to update mcelog to the most current version, 140.


* Updated to 140

 - mcelog, remove socket file on SIGINT


portlint -AC:
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
WARN: /usr/local/poudriere/ports/test/sysutils/mcelog/pkg-message: possible use of absolute pathname "/path/to/log".
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.

poudriere bulk -tC:
